metadata.title: Lovely-Mindmap
metadata.description: Build your own knowledge graph with smiles :-)

regex.target: text: "\u{1F917} 可爱思维导图设置"
.setName("在当前节点前创建同级节点")
.setName("在当前节点后创建同级节点")

regex.source: .setDesc("auto focus node when create new node")
regex.target: .setDesc("创建新节点时自动聚焦节点")

regex.source: .setDesc(`Custom your hotkey to create a sibling node before the current node. Default is Shift+Enter. Same as 'Create Child Node'.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`自定义热键以在当前节点前创建同级节点。默认是 Shift+Enter。与'创建子节点'相同。`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`Custom your hotkey to create a sibling node after the current node. Default is Enter. Same as 'Create Child Node'.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`自定义热键以在当前节点后创建同级节点。默认是 Enter。与'创建子节点'相同。`)

regex.source: Custom your hotkey to create a child node, default is Tab.
regex.target: 自定义热键以创建子节点，默认为 Tab。

regex.source: You can use any letter, number, or modifier combined with
regex.target: 您可以使用任何字母、数字或修饰符与

regex.source: to separate modifiers and alphanumeric characters.
regex.target: 分隔修饰符和字母数字字符。
